definition: Existing benchmark metrics that ask whether the single pre-specified tracked target crossed threshold.
Fraction of positive observations in which at least one expected panel species was detected.
Fraction of positive observations in which all expected panel species were detected, regardless of off-targets.
Fraction of positive observations in which all expected panel species were detected and no off-target taxa were reported above threshold.
Fraction of negative observations with no taxa reported above threshold.
Fraction of negative observations with any taxon reported above threshold.
Fraction of positive observations containing at least one off-target taxon above threshold.
Strict precision treating clean positive observations as true positives and any taxon-positive negative observations as false positives.
Harmonic mean of clean precision and clean sensitivity.
